creator: phillip@rmit.edu.au
text:
The sample apache.conf file supplied with apache-php3-1.3.6
	assumes that apache is launched from current directory /usr/local.
	The current config file contains relative file names (with respect
	to /usr/local).

Fix: 

apachectl can be patched to contain a "cd /usr/local" or
	the config file could be changed.
22a23,25
> 
> cd /usr/local
>
